subject: [PATCH v2 03/21] fuse: prepare for readdir passthrough on directories

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch prepares the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module to support readdir passthrough on directories. It allows directory inodes to have their inode iomode state applicable, and modifies the fuse_sync_release() helper function to handle directories. The changes enable cached mode, direct uncached readdir mode, and readdir passthrough mode for directories, but do not require waiting for parallel dio like regular files. This patch is a step towards implementing readdir passthrough on directories, which will improve performance by reducing the number of system calls required.
